creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
Comment on attachment 207058
svn-diff-secpanel

No, was not. 

I had a different output as you:

I don't have the lines
Applying[.CURDIR] :T to "/usr/ports/x11/gnome-terminal"
Result[.CURDIR] of :T is "gnome-terminal"
Applying[PKGORIGIN] :S to "x11/gnome-terminal"
Modifier pattern: "/"
Modifier pattern: "_"
Result[PKGORIGIN] of :S is "x11_gnome-terminal"
Applying[OPTIONS_FILE] :H to "/var/db/ports/x11_gnome-terminal/options"
Result[OPTIONS_FILE] of :H is "/var/db/ports/x11_gnome-terminal"
Applying[] :U to ""
.....
